summary: Public GA4 demo property maintained by Google. Real anonymized ecommerce traffic data — sessions, users, channels, revenue, conversion. Read-only.
auth_notes: Operator must join the demo Google Group (google-analytics-demo-readonly@googlegroups.com) with their Google account, then run `gcloud auth application-default login --scopes=https://www.googleapis.com/auth/analytics.readonly,https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-platform`. The fetcher script uses Application Default Credentials.
notes: v1 architecture: fetcher script runs locally with operator's Google credentials, dumps a JSON snapshot to substrate, dashboard reads the snapshot. Live API access from Pages Functions would require OAuth refresh-token plumbing — deferred.
